SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccessibilityElement
Mutable bag of accessibility-element properties produced by the three accessibility-tree flavours.
Alumni
Public entry point for the Java client.
Alumni.CheckOptions
Vision flag for Alumni.check(String, CheckOptions).
Alumni.Options
Construction-time options for Alumni.
Alumni.VisionOptions
Vision flag for Alumni.get(String, VisionOptions).
AppiumDriver
Appium (mobile) implementation of BaseDriver.
AppiumDriver.Platform
 
BaseAccessibilityTree
Common surface for the three accessibility-tree representations.
BaseDriver
Abstract surface every driver flavour must provide.
BaseTool
Sealed root of the tool hierarchy.
ChromiumAccessibilityTree
Chromium DevTools Accessibility.getFullAXTree payload rendered as XML.
ChromiumNodeTypes
Plain-data record shapes used when building synthetic accessibility nodes for cross-origin iframes.
ChromiumNodeTypes.ChromiumLocatorInfo
Selector + nth pair used to relocate an element at action time.
ClickTool
 
Config
Process-wide Alumnium configuration derived from environment variables.
Data
Result payload returned from the server for check() / get().
Data.BoolData
 
Data.FloatData
 
Data.IntData
 
Data.ListData
 
Data.NoopData
Represents the Python None (when value is the literal "NOOP").
Data.StringData
 
DoResult
Result of executing Alumni.doGoal.
DoStep
A single step in a Alumni.doGoal execution.
Element
Sealed wrapper over the three native element types returned by the supported drivers.
Element.Appium
 
Element.Playwright
 
Element.Selenium
 
HttpClient
Thin HTTP client that talks to the alumnium server.
HttpClient.ActionResult
 
HttpClient.ConnectionClosedException
Thrown when the HTTP transport could not reach the server.
HttpClient.HttpResponseException
Thrown when the server returned a non-2xx status.
HttpClient.PlanResult
 
HttpClient.RetrieveResult
 
Key
Keyboard keys recognized by the server for PressKey tool calls.
Model
Identifies a model by Provider and model name.
Names
Default model names per provider.
PlaywrightDriver
Playwright implementation of BaseDriver.
PressKeyTool
 
Provider
Model provider identifiers.
SeleniumDriver
Selenium implementation of BaseDriver.
ToolDescription
Attaches a class-level description to a tool record.
ToolField
Documents a tool record component so
invalid reference 
ToolToSchemaConverter
can emit a meaningful JSON schema.
ToolToSchemaConverter
Converts tool records into the JSON schema format expected by the Alumnium server.
TypeTool
 
UIAutomator2AccessibilityTree
UIAutomator2 page source rendered with stable raw_id identifiers.
XCUITestAccessibilityTree
XCUITest page source rendered with stable raw_id identifiers.
